legend.S: sql_dictionary の参照 ID。SQL 全文は末尾の辞書に 1 回だけ出ます。
legend.fp: 層B SQL 意味フィンガープリント。操作・対象テーブル・絞り込み列・書込列から作ります。
legend.layer_a: 層A statement_hash は正規化 SQL 文字列の厳密同一性です。
legend.layer_b: 層B fp_hash は CI3 生 SQL と Laravel/Eloquent SQL のような文字列差をまたぐ比較材料です。

sql_dictionary.S2:
INSERT INTO shop_cart_items (cart_id, customer_id, product_code, quantity, unit_price, is_gift, created_at)
             VALUES ({parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
sql_dictionary.S3:
SELECT ci.cart_id, ci.customer_id, ci.product_code, ci.quantity, ci.unit_price, ci.is_gift, p.name, p.price, p.is_set, p.is_reserved, p.is_point_exchange, p.point_cost, p.is_variety, p.variety_group
             FROM shop_cart_items ci JOIN shop_products p ON p.code = ci.product_code
             WHERE ci.cart_id = {parameter}
             ORDER BY ci.id
sql_dictionary.S4:
SELECT ci.cart_id, ci.customer_id, ci.product_code, ci.quantity, ci.unit_price, ci.is_gift, p.name, p.price, p.is_set, p.is_reserved, p.is_point_exchange, p.point_cost, p.is_variety, p.variety_group
             FROM shop_reservation_cart_items ci JOIN shop_products p ON p.code = ci.product_code
             WHERE ci.cart_id = {parameter}
             ORDER BY ci.id
sql_dictionary.S5: SELECT {parameter} AS found FROM shop_cart_items ci JOIN shop_products p ON p.code = ci.product_code WHERE ci.cart_id = {parameter} AND p.gift_trigger = {parameter} AND ROWNUM = {parameter}
sql_dictionary.S6: UPDATE shop_cart_items SET product_code = {parameter}, unit_price = {parameter} WHERE cart_id = {parameter} AND product_code = {parameter}
sql_dictionary.S7: SELECT {parameter} AS found FROM shop_cart_items WHERE cart_id = {parameter} AND product_code = {parameter} AND ROWNUM = {parameter}
sql_dictionary.S8:
INSERT INTO shop_cart_items (cart_id, customer_id, product_code, quantity, unit_price, is_gift, created_at)
             SELECT {parameter}, MIN(customer_id), {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, SYSTIMESTAMP FROM shop_cart_items WHERE cart_id = {parameter}
sql_dictionary.S10:
INSERT INTO shop_reservation_cart_items (cart_id, customer_id, product_code, quantity, unit_price, is_gift, created_at)
             VALUES ({parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
sql_dictionary.S12: SELECT {parameter} AS found FROM shop_delay_prefectures WHERE prefecture = {parameter} AND active = {parameter}
sql_dictionary.S13: SELECT {parameter} AS found FROM shop_remote_island_postals WHERE postal_code = {parameter}
sql_dictionary.S14: SELECT work_date, is_working FROM shop_working_days WHERE work_date BETWEEN TO_DATE({parameter}, {parameter}) AND TO_DATE({parameter}, {parameter}) ORDER BY work_date
sql_dictionary.S16: SELECT shop_orders_seq.NEXTVAL AS id FROM dual
sql_dictionary.S17:
INSERT INTO shop_orders (id, customer_id, address_id, email, shipping_method, payment_method, subtotal, shipping_fee, status, payment_status, delivery_date, delivery_time, created_at)
             VALUES ({parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
sql_dictionary.S18:
INSERT INTO shop_order_items (order_id, product_code, name, quantity, unit_price, is_gift)
                 VALUES ({parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter})
sql_dictionary.S21:
INSERT INTO shop_orders (id, customer_id, address_id, email, shipping_method, payment_method, subtotal, shipping_fee, status, payment_status, delivery_date, delivery_time, created_at)
             VALUES ({parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, NULL, NULL, SYSTIMESTAMP)
sql_dictionary.S22: SELECT component_code, component_name FROM shop_product_components WHERE parent_code = {parameter} ORDER BY sort_order
sql_dictionary.S27:
INSERT INTO shop_order_items (order_id, product_code, name, quantity, unit_price, is_gift)
             VALUES ({parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter}, {parameter})
sql_dictionary.S28: UPDATE shop_orders SET status = {parameter} WHERE id = {parameter}
sql_dictionary.S29: UPDATE shop_orders SET payment_status = {parameter} WHERE id = {parameter}
